expires_today.title: The Cybersecurity & AI Defense Mega Bundle by Packt
expires_today.description: Defend your sensitive data with AI
expires_today.long_description: Nothing gets past our latest Humble Video Learning Bundle: The Cybersecurity & AI Defense Mega Bundle! Learn how to protect your digital world using AI defensive tactics with exceptional courses from Packt. Prepare for your new career with video learning courses like Cybersecurity Fundamentals & Certification Prep – ISC2 Pathway, Mastering Cybersecurity with Python - From Basics to Advanced Defense, AZ-500 - Microsoft Azure Security Technologies - A Prep Course, more. Go from zero to cybersecurity hero, and help support the Starlight Foundation with your purchase!

expires_today.title: Data Visualization & Storytelling by Wiley
expires_today.long_description: Show—don’t tell—when you integrate storytelling into your data to help paint a broader picture. Unlock eBooks from leading authors in the space, like the For Dummies team, and awesome titles like Cool Infographics: Effective Communication with Data Visualization and Design, Data Points: Visualization That Means Something, and Data-Driven Security: Analysis, Visualization and Dashboards. Pay what you want for a powerful collection of data visualization and storytelling eBooks from some of the biggest names in tech, and help support the Electronic Frontier Foundation!

expires_today.title: The Ultimate Functional Programming by Pragmatic Programmers
expires_today.long_description: Start creating with a function-focused mindset with the all-new Functional Programming Bundle by Pragmatic Programmers. Learn to execute a variety of functions to save time and energy for yourself, a business, or a new programming hobby. Unlock cornerstone eBooks like Domain Modeling Made Functional, Programming Clojure Fourth Edition, From Objects to Functions, and more. Get practical resources for novice coders and seasoned pros, and help support Save the Children with your purchase!

expires_today.title: The Ultimate GenAI & LLM Developer Bundle
expires_today.long_description: Learn how to create your own LLMs and GenAI that understand, generate, and process at lightning speed with an all-new Humble Video Learning Bundle. Jump-start your career with this 15+ course library, highlighted by The Complete LangChain & LLMs Guide and AI & LLM Engineering Mastery - GenAI, RAG Complete Guide, you’ll gain the knowledge and confidence you need to succeed in these challenging and in-demand fields. Pay what you want for the ultimate GenAI and LLM bundle, and help support the World Wildlife Fund with your purchase!

expires_tomorrow.title: Music for Dummies 2026
expires_tomorrow.long_description:
The sweet sounds of savings have arrived to make your foray into musical stardom even easier with the 2026 Music for Dummies Bundle! The professionals from the For Dummies series are back again to help you unleash your inner musician. Learn a variety of digital instruments with in-depth lessons like eMedia Guitar For Dummies Level 1-2, eMedia Piano For Dummies Level 1-2, and eMedia Singing For Dummies Level 1-2. Take your passion for digital music to superstar levels of greatness, and help support the World Wildlife Fund with your purchase.

Keys expire. Please redeem before December 16th, 2026

expires_tomorrow.title: The Ultimate Linux & SysAdmin Bundle
expires_tomorrow.long_description: Learn the skills and gain the knowledge you need to succeed in system administration and development operations for Linux with this bundle of insightful courses by Packt. Inside this amazing curriculum, you’ll get expert insights on mastering AI networking, Windows 365, PowerShell scripting, and more. Deepen your understanding of SysAdmin and DevOps whether you’re a novice or a seasoned professional with courses like The Ultimate Linux Shell Scripting Guide, Microsoft Intune Cookbook - 2E and help support the Prevent Cancer Foundation with your purchase!

expires_tomorrow.title: Hot Mess Express: A Big Bundle of Misfit Heroes & Hilarious Hijinks by Image Comics
expires_tomorrow.long_description:
The content in this bundle is intended for mature audiences.

Lose yourself in a library of fantastic graphic fiction in The Hot Mess Express Bundle by Image Comics! Read creative graphic novels like Snotgirl Vol. 1: Green Hair Don’t Care, the coming-of-age story of Lottie Person, a chic yet insecure fashionista with a mysterious snot condition; I Hate Fairyland Deluxe Vol. 1-3, a mischievously magical dark adventure akin to Alice in Wonderland; and Dead Eyes Vol. 1, the origin story of Martin Dobbs, a former masked criminal forced back into a life of crime to pay his wife’s medical bills. Get 40+ comics and graphic novels, and help support The BINC Foundation with your purchase!

expires_within_72h.title: The Free League RPG Collection
expires_within_72h.description: Fresh TTRPGs by Free League Publishing
expires_within_72h.long_description:
Ready to spice up your TTRPG collection with the hottest titles from Free League Publishing? Unlock the core set for Dragonbane, an exhilarating classic fantasy game full of magic, mystery, and adventure that offers “mirth and mayhem roleplaying,” aka hearty laughs and brutal challenges. Or brave Mutant: Year Zero, a post-apocalyptic tale of humanity’s crawl back from streets turned graveyards as godlike mutants roam the wasteland. Try these or Vaesen: A Wicked Secret, all for a price you choose, and help support Direct Relief with your purchase.

Codes are redeemable through the DriveThruRPG website.

expires_within_72h.title: IK Multimedia Presents Studio Essentials: Pianos, Bass, Drums & Cinematic Sounds
expires_within_72h.long_description:
Create the perfect audioscape for your next game or creative project with IK Multimedia’s curated collection of studio essentials! Capture the magic of classic instruments from this extensive 1,000+ asset library of commercial-ready string, bass, and drum samples from themed packs like MODO BASS Studio Upright, Pianoverse - Grand Piano Y7, Miroslav Philharmonik 2, and more! Explore a variety of genres, from lo-fi to classical and everything in between. Get the assets you need to achieve the sound you’re looking for, and support Music Will with your purchase!

expires_within_72h.title: All-In-One 2D Game Dev Level Creation Pack
expires_within_72h.long_description:
Build entire game worlds faster with this massive Level Creation Bundle from GameDev Market. Designed to streamline your workflow, this collection gives you everything you need to create levels across multiple styles - from top-down and platformer to isometric environments and beyond. Jump straight into development with ready-to-use tilesets like Wolfsong Tilesets, Pixel Art Tileset Collection, Cartoon Platformer Tileset Pack, and more, all built to help you quickly design, iterate, and expand your worlds without starting from scratch. Stop piecing levels together asset-by-asset—get a complete toolkit to bring your ideas to life, and help support Girls Who Code with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 3rd, 2027. The coupon expires on August 31st, 2026.

The license agreement can be found here.
